response.justification: Bogdan brings approximately 20 years of broad engineering experience and recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, which is directionally relevant. However, the role demands a recognized AI expert at director-level IC seniority with demonstrated AI products at scale, strategic customer advisory experience, and ideally advanced academic credentials in AI — none of which are clearly evidenced in the resume. His AI exposure is very recent (2025), his technical profile skews toward generalist full-stack work, and there is no evidence of the enterprise-facing thought leadership or strategic advisory capacity the role requires.
strengths: ~20 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum tenure requirement
Active AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq demonstrates current, hands-on engagement with agentic AI paradigms
Founder of GISCollective and workshop/talk history show entrepreneurial initiative and a willingness to share knowledge externally
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field; both academic credentials listed are undergraduate-level and not AI-focused
AI expertise is nascent and limited to tooling/infrastructure — no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership at the depth expected for this seniority level
No evidence of director-level IC scope: advising strategic enterprise customers, influencing product roadmaps at scale, or operating as a recognized external authority in AI

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering tenure + current agentic AI work
